_doc: Ledger of Teammate items blocked pending a Computer decision. Computer-owned. A blocked Teammate has no merge power and no escalation path other than the bus, so an OPEN item here is a P1 — the self_audit teammate_blocked axis scores 0.0 while any item is open, forcing disposition. Computer logs a block when it sees one on #sal-teammate, and flips it to 'disposed' (with disposition_ref) when answered. This closes the doctrine hole that let EXEC-SETTLE-1 sit blocked.

items.summary: Agentic account is T+1 cash settlement; execution/safety.py sizing does not model unsettled cash. Teammate needs Computer constraints: (1) authoritative settled-vs-unsettled fields, (2) hard-reject on missing settlement detail vs Computer-side pre-review, (3) RFC-first vs code.
items.disposition_summary: get_portfolio buying_power is authoritative; executor enforces settled-cash + buying-power ceilings and fails closed on missing/ambiguous settlement data (Computer-owned, already in promote_and_place.py). Teammate may build an offline pure settlement_headroom(portfolio)->{settled,unsettled,ok} helper + fixtures (propose-only, no connector). No heavyweight RFC needed; this design note suffices.
